report_name: US Cracks Down on Southeast Asia Cyberscam Networks, Sanctions Cambodian Senator

threat_actors.name: Chinese organized crime groups
threat_actors.description: Transnational Chinese organized crime groups operating cyberscam networks from compounds in Southeast Asia. These groups are involved in 'pig butchering' romance and cryptocurrency scams and use victims of human trafficking to conduct the scams.
threat_actors.goals: Financial theft from global victims through large-scale online scams.

threat_actors.name: Kok An
threat_actors.description: A prominent Cambodian senator and businessman sanctioned by the U.S. Treasury and labeled a 'scam center kingpin' for his role in facilitating cyberscam operations.
threat_actors.goals: Financial profit from facilitating and running cyberscam operations.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: The cyberscam networks conduct large-scale 'pig butchering', romance, and cryptocurrency investment scams to defraud victims.

tools.name: Telegram
tools.description: The Telegram messaging app was used by the scam networks as a major recruitment channel, presumably to lure victims for human trafficking. This channel was seized by law enforcement.

identities.name: American citizens
identities.description: Victims of the Southeast Asian cyberscam networks, who lost nearly $21 billion to these types of online scams in 2025.

identities.name: Victims of human trafficking
identities.description: Individuals from across Asia lured with false job offers and then forced to work in the scam compounds under brutal conditions.

infrastructure.name: Cyberscam Operation Centers
infrastructure.description: Scam centers and compounds located in Cambodia and Myanmar where victims of human trafficking are forced to carry out large-scale cyberscams.

infrastructure.name: Cyberscam Recruitment Channel
infrastructure.description: A major recruitment channel on the Telegram messaging app used by the scam networks to lure victims for human trafficking. This channel was seized by law enforcement.
